summarySection.summary: Operations Coordinator with a strong background in logistics, compliance, and metrics tracking. Proven ability to optimize resource allocation and improve processes through technical expertise in data management and operational efficiency.

experience.description:
• Spearheaded the development and maintenance of backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django, ensuring secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design scalable service patterns and data models, enhancing operational efficiency.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, significantly improving visibility into operational metrics and backend data workflows.
• Streamlined Python data-processing pipelines and optimized PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency and enhancing system scalability.

projects.description:
• Developed a product detection system for retail environments using advanced algorithms like ResNet-50 and FPN, optimizing logistics for inventory management.
• Implemented smart anchor matching and IoU-based detection algorithms to effectively handle overlapping items, enhancing operational accuracy.
• Conducted comprehensive benchmarking on the SKU-110K dataset, providing detailed metrics and comparisons with YOLOv5 to drive performance improvements.
